title: Add coupon endpoint and orders migration
description: Adds a /coupons endpoint and adds caching with retry+backoff for coupon lookups.
diff:
diff --git a/api/coupons.py b/api/coupons.py
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/api/coupons.py
@@
+from fastapi import APIRouter
+router = APIRouter()
+
+@router.post("/coupons")
+def create_coupon(code: str, pct: int):
+    API_KEY = "sk_live_abcd1234efgh5678"
+    print("debug creating coupon", code)
+    return {"code": code, "pct": pct}
diff --git a/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql b/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/migrations/0007_add_coupons.sql
@@
+CREATE TABLE coupons (
+  id serial primary key,
+  code text not null,
+  pct int not null
+);
